name: Category Filter Pills
description: Horizontal row of clickable category filter pills. Clicking a pill shows only product cards with matching data-category attribute, hides the rest, and updates a result count display. Active pill gets primary color fill. Includes 'All Items' reset button. Self-contained JS filterCategory() function.
notes: Product cards in the target grid must have data-category attributes. The grid must have id='product-grid' (or change the querySelector in filterCategory()). The result count element must have id='result-count'.
